138452168.title: File:Conferencia de prensa Colapinto ACA octubre 2023 - BugWarp (13) (cropped).jpg

ObjectName.value: Conferencia de prensa Colapinto ACA octubre 2023 - BugWarp (13) (cropped)

Categories.value: Uploaded with pattypan|Self-published work|Extracted images|Files supported by Wikimedia Argentina|Files with coordinates missing SDC location of creation|Press conference of Franco Colapinto at ACA - October 2023|Files by User:BugWarp

ImageDescription.value: Press conference of Franco Colapinto at the Headquarters of the Argentine Automobile Club. Among the presents are: Eugenio Breard, Jorge Rosales, Daniel Igoillo, Luis Betnaza, y Jamie Campbell-Walter.
